prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Under the swaying curtains of seaweed lived Ollie the octopus, who had eight squishy arms and the softest polka-dot spots. Ollie loved collecting shiny shells and watching fish race by, but whenever someone smiled his way he hid behind a rock and wished his arms could be quieter. More than anything, Ollie wanted friends to play hide-and-seek and build pebble castles with, though his tummy felt as fluttery as a jellied balloon every time he tried to say hello. This morning, with sunbeams tickling the sand, Ollie decided he would try—just one small, wiggly wave—to see what might happen.
